sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO I_INFOJOINTPERSON_T( jointCardNumber,jointTelephone,jointName,jointNickName,jointWechat, jointQQ,jointHousePlace,jointHomePlace,isAdd,infoTId, validflag,addoperator,addtime) VALUES ('$jointCardNumber$','$jointTelephone$','$jointName$','$jointNickName$','$jointWechat$', '$jointQQ$','$jointHousePlace$','$jointHomePlace$',$isAdd$,$infoTId$, 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: select count(id) from i_infojointperson_t where validflag > 0 and infoTId = $infoTId$
select * from i_infojointperson_t where validflag > 0 and infoTId = $infoTId$
